description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a dark gray brick exterior and a red gable roof. The front features a small portico with white columns and steps leading to the main entrance, flanked by flower beds and a paved walkway. A driveway with two parked cars runs along one side, while the opposite side has a covered porch with white railings and steps down to the lawn. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained grassy yard with several trees and shrubs, including a large bush near the porch and climbing plants on the rear wall. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with a mix of single and double-hung styles. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and Craftsman influences, with classic proportions and decorative details.
description: A two-story dark gray brick house with a red gable roof, front portico, side porch, and a landscaped yard with driveway and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with portico, flower beds, driveway with two cars, and a large tree on the right.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the driveway, side of the house, and the covered porch with white railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the covered porch, steps to the lawn, and a large bush nearby.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the rear wall with climbing plants, driveway, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a mix of single and double-hung windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small portico, white columns, steps, and decorative flower beds
